AI at Work — Daily Digest
Generated 2026-07-15 13:28 UTC
==================================================

1. Do AI Agents Know When a Task Is Simple? Toward Complexity-Aware Reasoning and Execution
   https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.13034v1
   → Professionals need to understand when tasks are simple to optimize workflow efficiency.

2. PalmClaw: A Native On-Device Agent Framework for Mobile Phones
   https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.13027v1
   → Mobile LLM agents can now execute complex multi-step tasks directly.

3. FormalAnalyticGeo: A Neural-Symbolic Based Framework for Multimodal Analytic Geometry Problem Generation
   https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.12982v1
   → Analytic geometry problems in math require further exploration by MLLMs.

4. How Anthropic is pursuing a state-by-state push for ever-tougher AI safety laws, in contrast with OpenAI's "reverse federalism" strategy for common state rules (Politico)
   https://www.techmeme.com/260715/p26#a260715p26
   → State-level AI safety laws offer a more direct approach compared to federal regulations.

5. coreyhaines31/marketingskills
   https://github.com/coreyhaines31/marketingskills
   → Marketing skills for AI assistants enhance their utility across various business functions.

6. Rime, which helps companies field calls using AI voice models trained on conversational data it records in a studio, raised a $24M Series A led by M13 (Ivan Mehta/TechCrunch)
   https://www.techmeme.com/260715/p27#a260715p27
   → Rime's voice recognition technology automates call handling, improving customer service efficiency.

7. Audio-Native Speech Recognition with a Frozen Discrete-Diffusion Language Model
   https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.13013v1
   → Discrete-diffusion models can be used for speech recognition, offering new possibilities.

8. Form, Not Content? A Preregistered, Placebo-Controlled Evaluation of Learned Error-Conditioned Self-Repair Through Prompts and Weights in Frozen Small Code Models
   https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.12962v1
   → Self-repair mechanisms in frozen small code LLMs need placebo-controlled evaluation for effectiveness.

9. Human-AI Agent Interaction as a Neuroplastic Training Environment
   https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.12823v1
   → Human-AI interaction provides a unique training ground for AI agents to improve their performance.

10. Looking for developers with high-token AI workflows
   https://canopywave.com/events/unlimited-token-plan-200m
   → High-token workflows indicate the growing importance of optimized AI development processes.
